daily.summary: You could be thinking seriously about the past or reassessing recent events today, dear Aries. There’s a tendency to keep things to yourself, but you could have a bit of a heavy aura today as you think about more serious matters, and others may notice this. Still, when you are interacting, watch for being too quick on the trigger when speaking or communicating. It’s also best to avoid making assumptions about what others are communicating to you. Patience will serve you better and can bring in positive vibes. The Moon heads into your solar eighth house, and your need to observe and reflect is stronger than usual, as processing your feelings and recent events seems important now. Rather than pushing forward with new activities, take the time to explore what is on the inside.

monthly.summary:
The following are monthly horoscopes for Aries, typically available on the last day of the previous month. Cafe Astrology divides its monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here(you’ll need a birth time for an accurate Ascendant sign).

What are the dates/months for Aries?You have an Aries Sun sign if you were born from approximately March 21st to April 20th. However, the start and end dates vary from year to year, so if you were born around the start or end date of a sign, be sure to check your sign here:What is my Sun Sign? – Calculatorfor a definitive answer.

We divide our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor theCafe Astrology Ascendant Calculator tool.

Improvements or changes are in the works for your social life, hopes, dreams, or community involvement this month, dear Aries. February is powerful for payoffs from recent career or business efforts, networking, and connecting with friends. It's a more sociable phase, and taking some educated risks can expand your world now.

People are receiving you well, and possibly speaking highly of you as well. This is a month for making some bold moves, but not for pushing an idea or project that’s not ready to launch. February is a sociable month for you – one in which being part of a team brings you the most success. Share your time, ideas, and expertise now.

yearly.overview: The first half of the year is powerful for filling your inner well and strengthening ties with loved ones, dear Aries. Mid-year, a new cycle begins that encourages you to explore your playful, dramatic, and creative side.
yearly.summary:
The first half of the year is powerful for filling your inner well and strengthening ties with loved ones, dear Aries. Mid-year, a new cycle begins that encourages you to explore your playful, dramatic, and creative side.

But first, Neptune and Saturn enter your sign early in 2026. These big moves were teased last year, but now they’re happening! There will be times when you need to slow down and choose your battles wisely. You’re moving away from false paths that no longer serve you well or transforming them into more suitable ones! It’s a process, and it’s about your identity, initiative, and sense of independence–all “I” words, and it’s appropriate, because it’s all about you.

Saturn in your sign is a demanding transit, and it’s with you from February this year until April 2028. Through its influence, you learn to count on yourself. Of course, your relationship with yourself affects all life “departments” in profound ways. The responsibilities you may have let slide in the past come up for close attention, and while it can sometimes feel like an onslaught, you are more than equipped to meet the challenges.

Keep in mind that those things that you’ve managed well in the past are now being rewarded. Saturn is karmic – you are experiencing what you are due at this point. It’s a powerful time to get your life back on track. The process of getting closer to your true self will involve some restructuring of your attitudes toward professional goals and images.

At the same time, Neptune is now solidly in your sign starting in January, and this influence brings your imagination, idealism, and spirituality to the surface. So, while Saturn is asking you to define and structure your life in key ways, Neptune has a longer-term mission to break down some of your walls. Perhaps you need to define things before you begin the work of freeing yourself from overly strict labels.

You can be hesitant about sharing yourself with anyone except those closest to you (family and people who are close enough to be like family) in the first half of the year, after which you blossom. This is especially true if you have done a lot of “work” on centering yourself and learning about your desires, wishes, and needs.

Jupiter brings the expansion of fun, entertainment, and, for some, romance into your lives in the second half of the year. July features powerful aspects, and new ventures, especially creative ones, can be exciting and innovative – even cutting-edge. New experiences and opportunities are in the cards, and it’s about time! The second half of the year is about opening up. You’re taking things in stride and confident in yourself. Romance can be enjoyable. You’re more fertile and creative. People are paying attention to and enjoying you.

Uranus moves out of your money house permanently on April 25th, which can help steady, settle, and stabilize your resources and finances after a rather lengthy period of some unpredictability in these areas. Of special interest, too, is where it’s going now since Uranus spends seven years in a sign and is known to destabilize and excite the senses. From now until 2033, Uranus will transit your sector of communications, mental interests, the mind, mental outlook, transportation, and connections. This transit changes how you learn, think, communicate, and connect. New interests can come on suddenly this year and beyond. You’re challenging some of the beliefs or modes of thinking you’ve held and employed for most of your life now, and it can lead to breakthroughs and perhaps some interruptions in your studies or daily life.

It’s an exciting, although not always consistent, period for learning and sharing. Uranus harmonizes with Pluto in your social sector, and your desire to express yourself, along with your attitude towards networking and groups, is evolving.

This growing need to develop and diversify on mental levels can take you to interesting places in 2026. There is likely to be some trial and error involved with your interests and studies, and you may want to watch for sudden attractions to impractical ventures. Fortunately, a friendship, project, cause, or group association can blossom.

daily.summary: Your personal life can pull you in today, dear Taurus, or there could be a disorganized feeling inside that prevents you from feeling entirely efficient. There is some tendency to go overboard, say or think too much, or promise more than is good for you. Watch for exaggeration and too-high expectations, and don’t ignore your inner voice today. You have been in demand recently, and you are now very much in need of some downtime or mental space to arrive at decisions and conclusions. However, as the day advances, the need to support or entertain others is at the forefront. You have an increased desire to spend time with others. Deep, hidden topics of conversation are enticing.

monthly.summary:
The following are monthly horoscopes for the Taurus zodiac sign. Cafe Astrology divides its monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign.

If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor ourQuick Ascendant Calculator here.

The following are monthly horoscopes for the Taurus zodiac sign. Cafe Astrology divides its monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

This is one of the more goal-oriented times of the year for you, dear Taurus, with Mars at the top of your solar chart all month and a Solar Eclipse occurring there as well. February is about starting anew and making some waves. Your commitment is strong. You want to take charge of your future. As the month progresses, a social theme grows stronger, and your pursuit of happiness comes into greater focus.

This month, you seem to need more order and purpose in your life, and it’s an excellent time to achieve this. This theme will stick with you for some time, in fact, and it’s only just beginning to take flight, nudged along with the Solar Eclipse on the 17th. Success may be about career, reputation, or simply staying on top of things--whatever your particular definition at this point in your life, you are hungering for it!

yearly.overview: Jupiter continues to open the lines of communication in your life this year, and later, it boosts your home and family life. Uranus completes its transition out of your sign, helping stabilize your life.
yearly.summary:
Jupiter continues to open the lines of communication in your life this year, and later, it boosts your home and family life. Uranus completes its transition out of your sign, helping stabilize your life.

New interests and learning are powerful themes in 2026, but later this year, there can be a real settling-down process going on in your life. Your domestic world comes into stronger focus, and you can feel the need to expand, grow, and improve. Some may move into larger or more appropriate accommodations, while others work on improving their living conditions. You are likely to find more value – and joy – in your family and your domestic life.

The first half of the year is rich in opportunities to expand your knowledge and make pleasant contact with others. There can be a real feeling of connectedness with friends, siblings, your neighborhood, or your community. Interests expand. Communications projects are well-starred, and you might secure, complete, or refine a major project. Transportation matters can improve.

With Uranus leaving your sign in April (permanently this time), you’re likely to feel less on edge, rebellious, or triggered. You no longer feel the need to make a splash when it comes to asserting your independence. Relationships also begin to settle down. You’re closing an important chapter in your life. Uranus was in Taurus for many years, pushing you to find yourself.

As Uranus embarks on its lengthy journey through your resources sector, freelance work or various sources of revenue can be a theme. Connecting with your longer-term, overarching goals can lead to a new relationship with your money and things. With Saturn leaving your sector of business earnings this year and Uranus moving into your money sector, there can be a theme of freedom from restrictions on earnings or a changing money landscape.

It can be a time of some upheaval and unpredictability, but also of innovation and progress with matters of income, personal things, comfort, and security. Whether money means freedom to you or freedom is about detachment from certain possessions, this is a time of an evolving relationship with your material affairs.

Dreams are vibrant and involved this year. You pay more attention to synchronicities, signs, symbols, and omens in your life. You are building your faith in all that is “unseen.” In truth, there can be a lot of work done behind the scenes. While supporting others or dealing with problems in your private time can be draining at times, this can be an important time for facing fears and letting go of old attachments.

There can be family expansions or activities that sometimes clash with your need for independence or with your personal or professional plans. The demands of career and family can be especially strong, and finding a balance is challenging but also important, especially in July. This year, you’re battling tension about performance and reputation as you discover your ambitions. However, you mustn’t let this stress reach a level that interferes with your enjoyment of opportunities.

Overall, the year spotlights innovative or technological improvements, new ideas, and a forward-looking, happy energy with finances and home life. Loans or support may be forthcoming. A partner could be doing quite well at this time, helping your overall financial picture.

What you value the most is changing, and as this evolves, you’re building your confidence for more expressive periods to come. Major new projects begun from mid-2026 to mid-2027 can turn out to be very rewarding, profitable, and long-term, so lay down your foundations well.

daily.summary: It’s not an ideal day for purchases or financial decisions, dear Gemini. You may be dealing with some level of exaggeration, and you may want to avoid making decisions based on what you hear. The pace is likely to be lively, and sometimes a little hectic. In professional settings right now, watch that you don't say something that is too open to interpretation. Otherwise, be sure to take solid moments to wind down and relax. As the day advances, you're likely to feel a strong desire to help or to be of service to others with practical tasks. This is a time for organizing your life in small but essential ways, with a focus on the details, and it's a time when you thoroughly enjoy piecing things together. Although you tend to dwell on what you still need to do or what is going wrong in your life, it's better to take things one step at a time. To avoid feeling overwhelmed, narrow tasks down.

monthly.summary:
We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor ourQuick Ascendant Lookup.

Monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

February brings an exploratory energy and investigative spirit to your life, dear Gemini, and experiences that take you out of the usual routine can be a strong draw. The Solar Eclipse on the 17th can further stir your desire to expand your horizons. Adventures, big or small, are in order. You crave more interactivity, and your aspirations and ideals are driving forces in your life. Still, as the month progresses, a focus on your practical goals and responsibilities builds and strengthens.

The month is excellent for mind-opening experiences and seeking more meaning in your life. You’re trying new ways of approaching the world around you, exploring beyond your usual bounds, and breaking out of the regular routine. Whether it's physical or mental travel, sharing ideas, expressing yourself in new and exciting ways, or finding additional audiences, you're expanding your reach.

The Full Moon on the 1st can bring a learning or transportation matter to a head, and a turning point in your life. New avenues for communicating and commuting can lead to fabulous improvements, ultimately. For now, however, it can be chaotic as you adapt to the changes.

yearly.overview: Jupiter’s influence brings more pleasure in what you have in the first half of 2026, dear Gemini. Personal finances, communications, and learning are prominent themes in your life this year. Uranus moves into Gemini in April, this time for the long haul. It’s a year to explore your needs and pursue your dreams.
yearly.summary:
Jupiter’s influence brings more pleasure in what you have in the first half of 2026, dear Gemini. Personal finances, communications, and learning are prominent themes in your life this year. Uranus moves into Gemini in April, this time for the long haul. It’s a year to explore your needs and pursue your dreams.

2026 is a strong year for building and expanding, as well as for learning and connecting. More day-to-day contact with friends and family can be healing and pleasurable. In the first half of the year, you may be growing your material resources. It’s a time of abundance on some level – you might acquire or purchase something of value that you’ve always wanted, invest, or enjoy an increase in business and income. There can be a strong emphasis on comfort and enjoying simple (and sometimes not so simple) pleasures. You can take great pleasure in growing a business or enjoying the comforts of a relationship.

But while you’re in some ways settling in, you’re also exploring your independence with Uranus in your sign for seven years! This planet awakens your consciousness to areas of your life in which you’ve felt restricted. There may be unexpected events that free you from confining situations or past conditioning patterns. You are more inspired now, and your personality bubbles with bursts of enthusiasm. Uranus visits your sign from April 25th onward.

There can be a significant break from the past that propels your life forward. It’s important to watch for rebellious behavior — to aim to act rather than react. Uranus transits can be times when there is a significant new influence, person, or path in your life that rather dramatically deviates from your version of normal. Those born from May 20-26 and with a Gemini Ascendant of 0 to 6 degrees are most affected by this transit in 2026, and this energy is stirring for the rest of the sign.

You are looking to the future, not to the past, and the desire to leap forward into new and unexplored territory is powerful. You might find yourself attracting people or lessons into your life that encourage you to detach from traditions or conventions that have limited your growth in the past. Anything that broadens your thinking and life experience is especially important to you at this stage of your life.

More discipline and structure in your social life, with friends, and happiness pursuits can benefit you greatly. Many Geminis will start or build businesses this year that will benefit them for years to come. This will not come without hard work and persistence, but you are likely to enjoy the process more if you focus on what really matters in the long term. You’re reorganizing and changing things up so that you can improve your friendships and connections–or your feeling of connectedness, in general. It’s about making room for connections, relationships, and projects that empower you rather than hold you back.

In a sense, you’re going through a clean-up or a period of fine-tuning in your social life so that you can live more authentically. The benefits of this reset are great, even if they’re not immediately apparent.

The second half of the year finds you more communicative. It’s a strong period for a relationship based on communication, a publishing effort, a different course of study or interest, or a new business idea. More involvement with your immediate environment, community, and neighborhood can be in the spotlight. You’re finding your voice and more fully enjoying what you’re doing, learning, teaching, and sharing.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

For Gemini, you are in good shape to draw on experience, good karma, and your inner wisdom to further your career or material goals or meet your responsibilities to the outside world. Teaching or guiding may be connected with your work, and work done behind the scenes can pay off. You’re getting to a very healthy balance between optimism and practicality. Pacing yourself comes more naturally to you now.

daily.summary: On a mental level, you may be looking for something more today, dear Cancer, as Mercury and Jupiter form a minor but tense aspect today. You may not be seeing eye to eye with others just for now, but this doesn't have to be a problem. In fact, taking some time to rest your brain or think things through can be very useful and even advantageous now. Later today, the Moon heads into your solar fifth house, and you're especially willing to share your generous mood with the people around you. It's a time to appreciate or make the most of your leisure time.

monthly.summary:
Monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Keep in mind that if you know your Ascendant, it’s best to read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor look up your Ascendant quickly with ourWhat’s My Ascendanttool.

We’ve divided our 2026 monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

February positions you well for observation, strategy, investigation, and research, dear Cancer. Finances may deserve special consideration, particularly shared money and property, as well as loans and support. A passion project or special relationship can consume much of your attention. The month’s energies shift from inward to outward as it progresses, and in the second half, you’re up for new experiences and a more hands-on approach to your life. Until then, you’re in great shape for planning things out.

The first three weeks of February are more for keen observation than bold moves, but this doesn’t mean you’ll be inactive. There is likely to be an emphasis on deeper, more meaningful relationships with others or getting in deeper touch with your inner desires. Your intimate life speeds up this month, and conflicts regarding money or power dynamics can be part of the picture. Your reasoning and negotiating skills step up a notch, however, and problems are likely to be resolved fairly and relatively quickly.

There is a strong tendency to turn inward this month, and special projects or the need/desire to pour a lot of energy into something important to you can figure strongly. You’re not very interested in doing things halfway right now! Be willing to compromise and to make a fresh start with others, but if you genuinely feel short-changed, this can be a time when you’re ready to stand up for your needs and desires. Feelings are more intense than usual, although not uncomfortably so. In fact, you are more willing than usual to explore your deeper feelings. Love becomes a little more straightforward, and feelings tend to be expressed unreservedly from the 10th onward.

yearly.overview: It’s an exciting year for you, dear Cancer. You have expansive Jupiter in your sign until mid-year. If you haven’t taken advantage of its gifts and blessings, it’s now time to do so. It’s an ideal period for a very positive new personal beginning and awakening. You enjoy increased confidence, along with the confidence of others in you. Your personality, image, body image, and morale expand to new levels, and you see whole new possibilities. The year also involves you more intensely with your work or status and material goals. Career winds are shifting!
yearly.summary:
It’s an exciting year for you, dear Cancer. You have expansive Jupiter in your sign until mid-year. If you haven’t taken advantage of its gifts and blessings, it’s now time to do so. It’s an ideal period for a very positive new personal beginning and awakening. You enjoy increased confidence, along with the confidence of others in you. Your personality, image, body image, and morale expand to new levels, and you see whole new possibilities. The year also involves you more intensely with your work or status and material goals. Career winds are shifting!

You are doing your professional and public life quite differently this year, and you are capable of solid success. A deliberate, steady pace is important when pursuing your career, reputation, and life path goals. Certainly, there can be more pressure in these areas. Transits bring your responsibilities to the “outside world” to light, and at times, to the test. It’s a pivotal period for you regarding the structures you’ve built and your career or reputation.

This can be a time of achievement, recognition, new responsibilities, and harvest on career fronts. Others are taking you more seriously, which can be rewarding, but at times stressful. It can also be a time when poor past decisions come to light. It’s best to follow the rules and get organized.

Your increased personal confidence gives you more freedom to do what you want and experience life on a “new and improved” level. The second half of 2026 brings new and quite remarkable energy to your finances, personal possessions, as well as your sense of comfort and security. There is a stronger focus on the simple pleasures and comforts of life, though you might also have your eye on something expensive or indulgent. It’s actually a good time to make larger, significant purchases, generally speaking, and within reason. Earnings might expand now, but it’s very important to be grateful at this time in your life.

Look to develop, but don’t overreach. Excess can trip you up at a time when you have real, solid opportunities to improve your lot in life. Depending on what you want at this time in your life, it can be a time of more business or more leisure – whichever helps you feel content and leads to a feeling of abundance.

From April 25th onward, your social life evens out and steadies after years of a bit of turbulence or unreliability. Ideally, you’ve met some inspiring people and learned a great deal more about your associations and which ones represented you well. A new cycle begins that can stir up your private life (your private life becomes more “colorful” now), and interjects some unusual coincidences into your life.

It’s a process that slowly but surely detaches you from elements of your past that have limited your growth. This may be a time of radical changes in alliances and allegiances. Aim to free yourself from outdated ideas and attitudes that are keeping you attached to unhealthy paths.

In general, you are moving towards deeper thinking and the desire for depth and maturity in your connections to others. There may be some drama related to debts, shared assets, dependencies, or power dynamics in a relationship. Balancing your attention to your career or reputation with your attention to your private life and downtime can boost both areas of life. There can be breakthroughs on a psychological or intimate level, giving you a solid sense that you’re moving forward.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

For Cancer, learning and teaming up with others through study groups or friendships based on shared beliefs and interests can benefit you. It’s a good time to draw some boundaries and cement long-term friendships or group associations, while also allowing room for spontaneity and a sense of freedom. There is a real sense that as you build your skills and attend to your practical affairs, you’ll connect with people or causes that inspire and encourage you.

daily.summary: There can be some tendency to inflate or exaggerate what’s communicated today, dear Leo, or even what’s not said, quite possibly to your disadvantage. However, with this inclination tamed and motivation on the rise, today is good for gaining perspective. You are thinking in bigger terms but also streamlining. Later today, the Moon spends the day in your family and home sector, and you tend to withdraw or keep to yourself. Take this time to tone things down, and enjoy yourself. You need some peace or calm to center yourself.

monthly.summary:
Cafe Astrology monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember thatif you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. In fact, these horoscopes are even more helpful if read for your rising sign (Ascendant).

If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor the Cafe Astrology quickAscendant Lookup.

We’ve divided our 2026 monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember thatif you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign.

In fact, these horoscopes are even more helpful if read for your rising sign (Ascendant). If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor the Cafe Astrology quickAscendant Calculator.

February is a lively month for close relationships, dear Leo. While you may not always feel you're calling the shots, you have excellent opportunities to improve your interactions and connections. It's a powerful period for attracting or enhancing a special relationship, especially a partnership.

yearly.overview: A powerful year is ahead for you, dear Leo. Jupiter will move into your sign mid-year, sparking a personal new beginning of sorts and upping your personal magnetism to new heights. Until then, you are in a strong period for healing and doing inner work.
yearly.summary:
A powerful year is ahead for you, dear Leo. Jupiter will move into your sign mid-year, sparking a personal new beginning of sorts and upping your personal magnetism to new heights. Until then, you are in a strong period for healing and doing inner work.

In the first half of 2026, you’re especially drawn to your inner world. This period offers a sense of security in introspection. You might sometimes prefer to keep to yourself, where it seems safer and happier, but you can also be a pillar of support for others. It doesn’t feel like a time for major changes or decisions. In reality, you’re in a phase of significant soul-searching, questioning your approaches and paths, and it’s a valuable process.

It’s a powerful period for healing and serving – and thoroughly enjoying the process! There is, however, a tendency to overdo escapism, which should be watched. Perhaps your most important work in early 2026 is finding peace with the past, which will free you up for better enjoyment of the Jupiter-in-Leo transit that begins on June 30th and runs well into 2027.

July ushers in Jupiter into your sign, and you’re coming into your own–and into the light. The second half of the year is about awakening. Your desire to truly live life, rather than simply go through the motions, takes over. You project yourself with more confidence, and you’re letting go of past, more immature behavior patterns and becoming especially comfortable in your own skin. You’re improving your personal presentation in some manner. Personal pleasures, freedom, self-expression, and creativity are big on your list of priorities.

Exciting energy is with you in your love life. What is most important to you at this point in your life is a meeting of minds. In the first half of the year, love may be on the complicated side. There may be a relationship that is private or sacrificial in some manner. From mid-year forward, there is a romantic revelation, blossoming, or awakening. It’s also a strong time for adventure, education, and recognition of your creative talents.

A long-term cycle that’s influenced your career for many years is coming to an end in April. With this cycle’s end, dramatic ups and downs in your career path tend to subside. You’ll enjoy more predictability with your reputation, profession, life path, or status. Your aspirations begin to evolve. The cycle that starts as this one ends is bound to shake up your social circle. Some friendships may be left behind, and new ones made, although they may not be quite as reliable as the ones you had in the past. You may be moving with a new or different crowd in the years ahead. You are less prone to rebel in 2026 and more inclined to live authentically.

A new theme is weaving into your life this year, starting with the Solar Eclipse in February. Especially from the last week of July onward, your personality and partnerships can evolve. Your definitions of “me” and “you” are transforming. Issues of personal courage, confidence, and independence come to the fore. In particular, the North Node in your partnership sector from July onward nudges you toward better balancing and understanding your needs for independence and partnership, with an emphasis on improving negotiations, compromise, and one-on-one connecting.

With both Saturn and Neptune visiting your spirit sector starting early in the year, it’s a powerful time for special attention to courses or training, as well as for your voice! People are very interested in what you have to share. You’ll be firming up (and perhaps putting to the test) your beliefs or educational pursuits. Your attitude, outlook, and worldview are evolving in 2026. Life begins to feel more stable and directed, and your increased self-awareness puts you in a better position to make better decisions.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

For Leo, your special attention to structure and discipline, combined with some room for spontaneity and innovation, can help boost your career or reputation. You see definite improvements in your life as you relinquish rigidity and pressure while sticking with reliability and order. Getting your finances and support situation sorted out can motivate and inspire your work. This period rewards attention to practical and emotional needs, and fulfilling pursuits can result.

daily.summary: Watch for doing too much today, dear Virgo, as there's a tendency to misjudge things optimistically. Perceptions can be driven by a restless need to make more of your life, and exaggerated claims can be the result. Avoid making important decisions based entirely on information coming in now. Tune into broader thoughts, feelings, and visions, and save detailed work for a better day. The Moon heads into your solar third house later today, and you'll especially enjoy learning new things. You more readily take a few "risks" intellectually, and the rewards are good.

monthly.summary:
We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Monthly forecasts interpret the transits of the inner planets, including the Sun, Mercury, Venus, and Mars, as well as eclipse and retrograde activity. The month’s themes are summarized in the Overview horoscope section.

Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chartor the Cafe AstrologyAscendant Calculator.
