If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor the Cafe AstrologyAscendant Calculator.

Tremendous energy is with you in February for work, chores, or self-care pursuits, dear Virgo. It's an excellent time to scratch off most items on your to-do list and to initiate new programs and projects. But while work and mundane matters take center stage in the first few weeks of the month, you become more and more relationship-focused as February progresses.

With such a strong emphasis on your solar sixth house, organizing the little things will go a long way towards a stronger sense of accomplishment this month. You can work longer hours than usual, or push harder in health and fitness routines. While the Solar Eclipse on the 17th can bring new energy into your daily routines or work projects, it can also temporarily drain you if you are pushing yourself beyond your limits.

yearly.overview: The year ahead brings the potential for growth in your social life, happiness goals, work, and reputation, dear Virgo. In the first half of the year, and especially from March 10th forward, it’s a time for making connections and inspiring new ideas. Your social circle is expanding.
yearly.summary:
The year ahead brings the potential for growth in your social life, happiness goals, work, and reputation, dear Virgo. In the first half of the year, and especially from March 10th forward, it’s a time for making connections and inspiring new ideas. Your social circle is expanding.

Until mid-year, you’re continuing a cycle in which connections to friends, groups, and your community are beneficial and in the spotlight. It’s a strong time to reach out to others, network, and make connections. There can be group involvements that bring you much joy, new friendships that feed your spirit, and a broader focus on “happiness” goals all around.

Virgos are known for their strong connection to work and service. However, while work will assume some importance in 2026, you are now paying more attention to other needs – social, spiritual, and personal. A healing process is underway for you this year. It’s a time of service, but also a time for getting the rest you need. This is a time to detox from pressured situations and goals, and to make more time for sharing, connecting, and community.

The second half of the year brings Jupiter, the planet of abundance, into your privacy zone. This year-long influence (it lasts until July 2027) prefaces Jupiter’s transit of your own sign, which will bring you out of your shell and confident enough to reap your due rewards. Until then, there will be greater emphasis on privacy, downtime, relaxation, meditation, and rest. There can also be some sacrifices made for others, as your own needs seem to be less pressing as those of the people you love. You may be doing a lot for others at this time, and mostly quite happily. You more easily brush aside ego issues, recognizing your contribution to others as highly important. Of course, you need to draw some boundaries, but for the most part, this is all a voluntary process that brings you joy.

There can be a lot of focus on serving the family in the second half of the year. While this is a time for healing from the inside out and some release from the pressures of the world and the pressures you place on yourself, it’s, of course, important to avoid overdoing escapist tendencies. Be sure to check in from time to time and determine whether it’s doing more harm than good.

Overall, beautiful energy is with you for psychological or physical healing programs and efforts. You can experience an awakening of your inner life and powerful intuition. You can improve intimacy in your relationships and in your relationship with yourself. The year can be powerful for healing, socializing, resting, and preparing for the busier years to come.

It’s a good time to gain a supporter, backing, or counseling/advice. There could be a confidant who helps you release some frustrations. Perhaps most importantly, you’re striving toward personal growth on an emotional level, and it’s a rewarding experience.

A long-term influence that cast quite a veil of confusion over your partnership sector ends early this year, and this brings more clarity to your world of committed partnerships. With Saturn consistently in your intimacy sector from mid-February onward, the goal is to identify and then weed out unhealthy attachments or dependencies, whether emotional or financial or both. It’s a powerful process! Saturn acts as a bit of a nag for Virgo – guilt, adjustments, some worry: these are all possible. It also encourages you to manage your debts and adopt better habits.

Uranus heads to the top of your solar chart on April 25th, this time, for the long haul (until 2033). It’s a powerful influence on your social standing, reputation, and career aspirations. You had a sneak peek of this energy last year, and now, it’s sticking. This influence excites your ambitions and encourages you to redefine what you want to do with your life. You may recognize talents that you never knew you had, and this can be a sudden, exciting discovery. Your life path or professional life may be changing now, and for some, challenges with current authority figures can motivate a break from the past.

It’s a time of more experimentation or attention to alternatives regarding your career or reputation. If you’ve felt confined or inauthentic in these areas, this transit is likely to address these problems. There can be times when your need for independence can dominate and drive many of your actions regarding your life path, career, and responsibilities. However, it’s also a time when you feel freer or more confident pursuing your dreams and goals.

daily.summary: While you may want to focus on routine tasks today, dear Libra, you're unlikely to feel fully satisfied with the mundane temporarily. Your mind may wander, whether due to many distractions around you or more susceptibility to distractions! You might also find yourself attempting to attach meaning to what you do or to your life today, as a higher purpose is something you're seeking now. Overall, you're in a friendly, curious mood, however, and while there can be some difficulties prioritizing, if you let go of this need, you'll be in better shape. Later today, the Moon heads into your solar second house, and you're inclined to focus on your physical and sensual needs more than usual. In fact, you can be craving a little more predictability now.

monthly.summary:
Cafe Astrology’s Monthly Forecasts are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

We divide our 2026 monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates/decans) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor use Cafe Astrology’sAscendant Calculator.

February is strong for injecting some inspiration into your creative or romantic life, dear Libra. Love, pleasure, joy, entertainment, and your personal life are in stronger focus. Your powers of attraction run exceptionally high, and you can pour more energy into expressing and enjoying yourself. It's natural to attract favorable attention from others, and passions run high. Hobbies are a stronger draw. As the month progresses, work matters become a stronger priority, as do self-care and health programs. It’s an excellent time not only for finding and enjoying work but also for relationships on the job.

You may frequently find yourself in the right circumstances to fully enjoy and express yourself, especially in the first weeks of the month, especially. While you should watch for impatience, this is an excellent time to have the courage to pursue your heart’s desire. It can be a spirit-feeding, pleasurable time in your life. At the very least, you’ll put plans in place for bringing more playfulness into your world. The Solar Eclipse on the 17th may usher in change and new beginnings on these fronts. You might resolve to make more time for play, and since this eclipse is part of a larger set that lasts until early 2028, this is just the beginning.

After a spell of being fairly wrapped up in your personal life, you may realize the need to reach out to others and remind them that they matter to you around the Full Moon on the 1st. It’s a time to enjoy new revelations and share your findings with people you care about. This Full Moon reminds you of your need for friends, associates, community support, or like-minded people.

yearly.overview: You’re making progress in the outer world or connecting with your ambitions in empowering ways this year, dear Libra. Setting and pursuing goals can be enjoyable. A fortunate change in status can be in store. A positive attitude towards work brings great rewards. Your innate idealism is also stirring in 2026. You’re reaching out to others, and you are well-received.
yearly.summary:
You’re making progress in the outer world or connecting with your ambitions in empowering ways this year, dear Libra. Setting and pursuing goals can be enjoyable. A fortunate change in status can be in store. A positive attitude towards work brings great rewards. Your innate idealism is also stirring in 2026. You’re reaching out to others, and you are well-received.

Particularly from March until mid-year, you may enjoy positive exposure, promotion, or career recognition or growth. You are learning to “own” what you do and feeling more comfortable in a position of leadership or authority.

Communications, promotion, and word of mouth are especially beneficial. Feeling responsible and competent can empower you, and others will recognize your ability to express yourself clearly and effectively. There can be recognition for mental projects, writing, public speaking, or ideas. Most of the attention you’re getting now is positive.

Even so, the second half of the year can feel much easier all around. Pressures are off – it’s a more anonymous time in many ways, as you are valued for your ability to get along with others more than for your accomplishments and performance. There is a nice feeling of contentment, yet also a subtle pressure-free desire to formulate long-term “happiness” goals as well as openness to change and progress. You’re more interested in contributing to group efforts or your community. Friends can be very helpful and enjoyable.

In love, you require more than the ordinary, humdrum, and regular experiences for your heart to engage. Attracting tumultuous love relationships or controlling or intense people is possible. Casual relationships that end up demanding a lot from you, and possibly draining you, can be in the picture. With committed relationships, you will need to be careful that you’re not holding out for someone unattainable and missing out on more empowering relationship opportunities in the process. Love opportunities can arise in non-routine places or through learning or publishing. Networking is strong for you and opens you up to many new possibilities, which can benefit or initiate a partnership.

New connections are forward-looking and often mutually beneficial, encouraging you to explore relationships that can support your goals. You have an enterprising spirit and a strong sense of fairness. From May forward, if in the midst of studies, watch for sudden changes of heart regarding your areas of focus. Consider whether switching around programs is really worth the extra time. You benefit from living your life according to your own values, not simply reacting to what others are (or aren’t) throwing your way. Rebelling can, eventually, lead you back to yourself with greater understanding, and this is “where you are at” now. A friend could be integral in achieving your goals this year, and partnering with a buddy in some tangible way can be part of the picture.

In recent years, work or daily schedules may have been a little muddled with Neptune’s influence on your work and health sector, and early this year, Neptune permanently leaves this sector. More clarity and purpose will slowly but surely come to you.

Uranus moves into your adventure sector for the long haul this year on April 25th, and this can excite your senses, stirring interest in enjoying some new adventures, whether on the physical or mental plane (or both). You’re opening your mind to new ideas and concepts, and opening your heart to new experiences and ways of approaching your life with this long-term transit that supports your efforts to make meaningful changes. It’s a robust period for sharing your ideas, traveling, publishing, pursuing higher education, or exploring alternative beliefs.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

For Libra, you have support for improving your lifestyle and habits. You can better manage your time, and you’re increasingly more aware of the need for a balanced approach in your relationships, with money, and regarding diet and habits. Separating work and downtime can be key to this. Financial or intimate matters may not always be steady, but this doesn’t compromise your work ethic or subtract from your efforts.

daily.summary: Somebody could be making more of an issue than it is today, dear Scorpio, and exaggeration leads to mistakes or frustrations. While it’s best not to trust everything you hear at times today, you can enjoy and learn from some mental meanderings. Later today, the Moon heads into your sign, and you're likely to feel connected and engaged or crave involvement. However, you may not know how to direct the extra energy that you have today. Aim to reflect and find your center. Your ideas are especially bright and creative, and it's a strong time for getting in touch with your emotional needs.

monthly.summary:
We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor ourQuick Ascendant Calculator here.

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

You’re connecting with your needs for a solid, happy base of operations this month, dear Scorpio, with a strong focus on your solar sector of heart and home. The month also spotlights your creativity, hobbies, pleasures, and love life, especially as it progresses. Improvements in your living conditions, family relations, and leisure time can figure strongly. Home life is especially animated. It's a good time to channel excess energy into projects around the home.

With Mars in your solar fourth all month and a Solar Eclipse occurring in the same sector on the 17th, your domestic life is busy. Projects around or in the home are favored, and so are activities with family and loved ones. Because the energies centered on this sector of your solar chart are so dynamic, you’ll want to do something special, take action, and make changes. In fact, changes in your family dynamic or home life are necessary–and may be a long time coming–as the Solar Eclipse ushers in powerful energy for new beginnings in your personal life.

Balancing your personal and professional/public life can be challenging, but it’s an important goal around the Full Moon on the 1st. This lunation, happening at the top of your solar chart, can mark the culmination of a significant work project or a scurry of activity on the job or in your public life. Events occur that highlight your responsibilities. Acknowledging your need to perform, lead, and manage can be in focus, and you might recognize buried needs or bring a project to fruition.

yearly.overview: The year ahead is a period for learning and manifesting, dear Scorpio. The first half of 2026 is a powerful time to hone your expertise and gain experience. You’re learning about the world around you and updating your skills.
yearly.summary:
The year ahead is a period for learning and manifesting, dear Scorpio. The first half of 2026 is a powerful time to hone your expertise and gain experience. You’re learning about the world around you and updating your skills.

Until June 30th, study and learn what you can while your mind is a sponge, while educational opportunities are abundant, and while good teachers or mentors tend to be more available to you. This way, you’ll be able to take fuller advantage of the career peak coming that begins as early as mid-year. There’s money here, in addition to a stronger feeling that you’re truly living life, rather than just going through the motions.

From mid-February forward, organizing your daily routines and meeting responsibilities head-on is in focus. At the same time, pressures from both Neptune and Saturn release from romantic relationships and your world of leisure and entertainment, lightening your load. These areas have been heavier in recent years, and you’re likely to feel freer to enjoy your creative and romantic world going forward.

The second half of the year is strong for finances. You’re projecting an image that shows others you truly value yourself, which can attract respect and possibly also monetary rewards. It’s a time to put yourself out there. People notice you, respond to you, respect you, andvalueyou. You might gain recognition for your natural talents. There can be a promotion, the start of a new business or expansion of a current one, or a boost in a relationship with a parent.

Partnerships may have been a wildcard in your life for many years, but this is set to change from April 25th onward. In recent years, you’ve likely experienced experimental or alternative ways of relating, whether this was voluntary or not. You are now moving into the position to process the lessons you’ve learned about your expectations of others and what you truly want from a partnership. You also benefit from living your life according to your own values, not merely reacting to what others are –or aren’t– throwing your way. Rebelling can eventually lead you back to yourself with greater understanding, and this is where you’re at on this journey in 2026.

You’ll find people in your life less rebellious or unpredictable. Even so, some experimentation with relationships is likely to continue. Your attitude towards intimacy and finances will change over the coming years as you open yourself to new pleasures and detach from old habits, tastes, and desires. You’ll also be exploring different financial arrangements. Unexpected events and feelings are stirring regarding your intimate life, financial life, and support systems. On some level, you’re seeking more freedom with your sexuality, in your relationships, and regarding support or attachments. Freeing yourself from limiting expectations or restrictions can figure strongly now.

There can be changing attitudes toward domestic life and family this year, or your roles are evolving, and issues with control and dependency may surface. You could be more involved in or invest more in your home and family.

With your daily life, you’re bringing more ambition, common sense, and the ability to turn your plans into reality to the table from mid-February forward. It’s a powerful time to get started on a healthy lifestyle change or to discipline yourself to get a job done, and done well!

This year, you’re reaching a new understanding of your goals and believing more powerfully in your general direction. Your efforts to revamp your daily routines and pursue wellness help round out your life and create better opportunities to succeed. Good energy is with you as you bring more structure to your life without compromising your need for imagination and entertainment. It’s a time when believing in yourself, your competency, and your ability to take the lead opens up opportunities to you.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

daily.summary: It can be all too easy for people to blow something out of proportion today, dear Sagittarius. While people or information can be distracting, the day is just fine for making small or subtle advances that ultimately work in your favor. You might find ways or make plans that help you expand your personal horizons. With the Moon moving into your solar twelfth house later today, indulging in some alone time can be very beneficial, so if you can, take some time to focus on yourself. You may not accomplish as much as you'd initially hoped. However, this may be a good thing! Sometimes you need this kind of "down" time to recharge for the busier days ahead.

monthly.summary:
We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

Sagittarius datesare approximately from November 22 to December 21. However, it’s important to note that all Sun sign dates are approximate since they change from year to year. In other words, they’re dependent on your birth year, and in some cases, birth time. If your birth date is on or near either of these dates, then you may have a Sagittarius Sun sign or something else (Scorpio or Capricorn). Be certain with the following tool:What’s My Sun Sign?

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor useCafe Astrology’s Ascendant Calculator.

February's pace is sometimes quick for you, dear Sagittarius, as your desire for variety increases and you seek mental engagement and contact. It’s a time to reach out to others and enjoy the connections you’re making. There is special emphasis on communicating, connecting, and learning this month, and your sector of home and family is building in power. You’re curious, sharing more, making contacts and connections, learning new skills, and discovering or indulging personal interests.

You can be fired up over a new or renewed personal interest, and it can be a powerful time for new beginnings with transportation and connection. There can be many errands and daily comings and goings to manage. For some, communication or transportation breakdowns prompt new beginnings. While frustrating, new worlds can open up as you approach the world differently and discover new ways to express yourself and connect with others.

yearly.overview: The year ahead is strong for passion projects, shared resources, intimacy, publishing, and connecting, dear Sagittarius. Absorbing pursuits, deeper relationships, and exciting personal interests are in store. The second half of 2026 finds you more interactive and adventurous, but until then, you’re doing important work as you connect with your deeper needs and desires.
yearly.summary:
The year ahead is strong for passion projects, shared resources, intimacy, publishing, and connecting, dear Sagittarius. Absorbing pursuits, deeper relationships, and exciting personal interests are in store. The second half of 2026 finds you more interactive and adventurous, but until then, you’re doing important work as you connect with your deeper needs and desires.

The year 2026 brings strong energy to your intimate world and, later, excellent opportunities for self-expression and adventure. Booster transits benefit your relationships with banks, taxes, debts, financial advisors, loans, and investments. You might never have reached such depths in a relationship until now. Psychology and other healing methods can be in the picture, and most helpful.

Good energy is with you for shared resources in 2026; for example, a partner’s income increases, or you pool resources in a new living arrangement. Your intimate life is enriched through opening up to someone and enjoying new experiences, a supportive friendship is in the spotlight, or you learn much more about yourself and your deeper needs.

The second half of the year is especially growth-oriented in more explicit, tangible ways. Benefits can come through long-distance experiences and people. You come out of your “shell” in many ways as you enter a decidedly more outgoing phase of your life. You’re awakening to new ways of expressing yourself, learning about others and the world around you, a spirit for adventure, and a sense that you are truly living your life, not just going through the motions. It can be a time to update your skills, pursue higher education, or enjoy a special interest. You are approaching a peak period for career and recognition that begins in mid-2027, and now is the time to prepare.

This is also a favorable time for publishing, promotion, travel, language learning, teaching, spirituality, sports, competition, outdoor adventures, and so forth. Learning is very enjoyable. It’s easier than usual to win approval from teachers, instructors, or mentors, and to connect with good ones.

Creatively speaking, while your general demeanor may be on the serious side this year, you are discovering highly unique and creative ways of expressing yourself. You are looking for more from love – it’s increasingly about intimacy as well as mystical or romantic elements. You are attracting unusual, sometimes elusive or mysterious, people into your experience.

A long-standing influence leaves your life on April 25th, and it’s one that wreaked some havoc on your daily schedules and work. Now and in the years to come, a more scheduled, organized life is within reach. At the same time, Uranus moves into opposition to your sign for seven years. You had a sneak peek of this last year, and now this transit is sticking (from April 25th onward). Big changes in the dynamics of close partnerships (personal and business ones) are necessary as Uranus moves through your partnership sector, shaking up the status quo. You may need to give a partner more freedom and space, and there may be times when you feel you suffer as a result. However, it can also be a time of brand new approaches to relating that are exciting and rewarding, even if at times they feel uprooting.

You’re discovering more wonder in a creative project, romantic relationship, entertainment, or a special pastime or hobby this year. Still, it’s also where you’re ready to buckle down, focus, and improve. Combining the responsible and more imaginative elements of your interactions and activities can be most successful. Your creative, romantic, or recreational life is developing in some ways, but in others, it is becoming more disciplined. You can find it satisfying to hunker down and get serious about love and joy! You’re a little more practical and cautious with matters of the heart and personal enjoyment.

You’ll find the year quite supportive of creative expression, love, personal fulfillment and enjoyment, education, and spirit, especially in July and August. A stronger sense of meaning and purpose drives you. A building interest in broadening your mental experiences and finding expression of your personality through them, perhaps through higher education or exploring different philosophies of life, is with you.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

daily.summary: Transits today stir bigger ideas and thoughts, dear Capricorn, pulling you away from the pressure of details. It’s all too easy to misjudge things, however, particularly with time, money, and energy requirements. It’s best not to overcommit, or even to commit at all just for now. Concentrating on creating more harmony with friends can be successful if you’re flexible. There is friendly energy taking over later today as the Moon heads into your solar eleventh house, helping ease pressure. You're likely to feel more creative and at ease when it comes to expressing yourself, so let the creativity flow! Today is a day to recuperate and recharge before new challenges arise, so grab opportunities to decompress.

monthly.summary:
Monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. An overview of the month’s themes is provided, along with more specific transits of the Sun, Mercury, Venus, Mars, eclipses (if they occur this month), and retrograde activity.

Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here. Aquick Ascendant lookup tool can be found here.

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here, or useCafe Astrology’s Ascendant Calculator.

February brings a strong focus on predictability, security, and money matters, dear Capricorn. It can be a time to take charge of your finances and generate new ideas, budgets, or plans to better manage your resources, money, and talents. You’ll also focus on learning new things and improving your communication skills.

Mars charges through your solar second house all month, and a Solar Eclipse happens in this same sector of your solar chart on the 17th. As such, you can be intent on bringing your recent ideas and endeavors to life and building or developing these projects. With this strong emphasis, you want tangible results, but you’re also willing to put in the time and energy to achieve your goals! While the month can be intense at times, you’re moving towards a more patient and moderate approach to life that truly works for you.

yearly.overview: The following full yearly horoscope for Capricorn includes an overview and summary, outer plant influences, and major aspects (such as the Saturn-Uranus sextile) in 2026 and how they specifically affect Capricorn, and horoscopes divided into decans.
yearly.summary:
The following full yearly horoscope for Capricorn includes an overview and summary, outer plant influences, and major aspects (such as the Saturn-Uranus sextile) in 2026 and how they specifically affect Capricorn, and horoscopes divided into decans.

Significant partnerships and relationships can be a strong focus this year, and you can enjoy opportunities to improve a close relationship or enter into a new partnership. People tend to be supportive of you, and you can find much joy with a special someone. Some of you could be entering profitable business partnerships. There can be new levels of intimacy from mid-2026 onward, and great pleasure in being close to someone. New depths (and heights) can be experienced in a relationship this year, which can add to your inner glow.

Eclipses this year encourage you to pay special attention to how you communicate, connect, and present your ideas. Polishing these things will go a long way towards your happiness and fulfillment. This can also be a time for boosting a relationship with a sibling, classmate, or neighbor. More involvement and improvement figure strongly.

However, you’re also beginning to pay special attention to your income, resources, valuables, and natural talents as a new eclipse set moves in. Getting your assets sorted can be an important focus. With money or things, you can be going through restructuring, possibly putting some business projects to rest. You can be very resourceful when it comes to recycling or using what you already own in different ways. You might find unique products to sell and market.

While Saturn is asking you to be responsible in your domestic world, Uranus wants you to find a more authentic approach to your job, daily life, and routines. This can be tricky at times, but manageable. You’re moving toward a fresh approach to your work and the daily details of your life. Irregular schedules and perhaps some disruptions and tensions are possible this year as you adjust to this influence that’s with you from April 25th onward. Your working hours may become non-traditional, or a job may be unconventional. You are restless with routines and tend to answer to your own internal rhythm rather than paying attention to society’s (and nature’s!) rhythms. Work that is limiting or lifeless drags you down more than usual.

During this new cycle that will stick with you for about seven years, it would be wise to do work or enjoy routines that offer you not only variety and stimulation but also the chance to invent and create. You may also be interested in alternative health methods. You could benefit greatly from yoga or other mind-body therapies now.

It’s also interesting to note that Uranus is leaving your sector of romance and creativity for good in April this year, since it’s been such a long-term influence. This can point to some settling down and greater reliability in romance, relationships with your children, creative projects, and hobbies, whichever is applicable.

Focusing on compassion and intuition as tools to help you better understand yourself and others, particularly family, can be especially helpful this year, but you’re also in need of more structure and practical attention to your domestic world. Improving your living conditions, self-esteem, and comfort levels are priorities. Some of this process is very internalized–you’re getting in deeper touch with yourself, determining what you truly want from life, what childhood conditioning issues are holding you back, and just how much inner power and strength you possess. A bit of self-absorption seems necessary.

Projects you begin this year may very well last–the very beginnings of long-term businesses or projects might happen for you in 2026. You seek comfort and stability, but also improvement, in your personal life. A more inspired yet practical approach to your domestic world can enrich your life and boost your intimate life or passion projects. It’s a powerful time for long-term financial planning and strengthening your financial picture.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

daily.summary: You may be making more of something than it deserves today, dear Aquarius. It’s best to avoid jumping to conclusions and to take casual information with a grain of salt. While there may be misunderstandings or misjudgments, your concern and care can certainly help compensate. The tendency to throw energy around today doesn’t have to be a vice. In moderation, it’s a good thing for branching out. Later today, the Moon moves to the top of your solar chart, and your responsibilities come into focus. With this transit, you feel more at ease with meaningful tasks than you do with frivolous ones.

monthly.summary:
Monthly horoscopes are divided into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. An overview of the month’s influences is provided, as well as more specific transits of the Sun, Mercury, Venus, Mars, and eclipses (if they occur this month), as well as retrograde activity.Aquarius Daily Horoscopesreveal further details.

Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart hereor use ourquick Ascendant lookup toolto get straight to the point!

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

February is very much about attending to your personal needs, dear Aquarius. Generally speaking, things are playing in your favor. With Mars in your sign all month, your independence and freedom are especially important to you. Your desire nature is very powerful, and while you may need to tone it down a little at times, if you use this period well, you’ll have all the courage necessary to make your dreams happen. The ball is very often in your court this month.

This can be a time of moving ahead with personal plans, becoming more active and involved, communicating, learning, and competitive undertakings. Mind you, you could feel that you’re often left to your own resources or especially independent, and this may or may not be welcome at this time in your life! However, certain people in your life seem to have your interests, agenda, and happiness in mind.

yearly.overview: Most notable bright areas this year – and there are plenty – are self-care and self-improvement endeavors, work, long-term partnerships, and friendships. Your schedule is likely to be quite full in the first half of the year, but mostly pleasantly so. For those of you in need of work or who want to improve their daily routines or working life, this is a fabulous time to do so, although you’ll need to watch for taking on too much.
yearly.summary:
Most notable bright areas this year – and there are plenty – are self-care and self-improvement endeavors, work, long-term partnerships, and friendships. Your schedule is likely to be quite full in the first half of the year, but mostly pleasantly so. For those of you in need of work or who want to improve their daily routines or working life, this is a fabulous time to do so, although you’ll need to watch for taking on too much.

You may be meeting new friends through the work you do or through your pursuit of health and wellness goals. While you can feel pressure on a personal level, you’re in a strong position for comfortably meeting your responsibilities this year. Finances are less confusing or uncertain in 2026. Transportation and communication issues can be in strong focus as you find more efficient ways to get around and connect.

The second half of the year can be quite excellent for partnerships, whether these are business, romantic, or both. Opportunities for relationships can open up for you. For some, a friendship can move to a whole new level. Negotiations and counseling situations can be beneficial. You might find yourself in a teaching or counseling role or as a trusted advisor. One-to-one counseling sessions can be very helpful. Getting married or entering a new long-term partnership is possible; partnered Aquarians will benefit from infusing their current relationship with more fun, enjoyment, generosity, and vision.

There may have been times when you felt you were alone and in charge, but in 2026, that’s changing. People who have your interests at heart or who uplift you can enter your life, or existing relationships can improve significantly. There can be great innovations in your life, with new ways to communicate and move your life forward. There can be a lot of activity with writing, public speaking, new interests, and exciting friendships. You’ll require stimulating or simply new and different entertainment.

With Pluto in your sign, you are learning about your personal power, sometimes through challenging life lessons and experiences. The temptation may be to attempt to control or micro-manage things, but you’ll better experience your own freedom if you can resist this urge.

Saturn and Neptune moving out of your finance sector early in 2026 takes pressure and restriction off money matters. Your relationship with your money and things has evolved, and you’re now less inhibited about expressing your natural talents. This theme is helped further as Uranus, your modern planetary ruler, heads into your creativity sector on April 25th for a visit of about seven years. It’s a powerful time to connect with and explore your creativity.

The long-term cycle that brought change and unpredictability to your home and family life ends this year on April 25th. This shift takes quite a bit of pressure off. At the same time, a new cycle begins, and creatively speaking, you’re blossoming as you discover new and unique forms of creative or playful expression.

Uranus in your solar fifth house is a relative newcomer and a long-term guest, bringing excitement – perhaps even thrills – but also possible instability in romance and creative output from time to time. You’re discovering your inner child and getting in touch with your creative muse, and there can be some ups and downs in the process. These things are not something you can schedule or control! You may be attracting unusual, progressive, alternative, or erratic people into your world now, particularly on a romantic level. You may also need to deal with matters of independence and personal freedom with your children or in your dating life, if applicable. All in all, however, this is a wonderful transit for loosening you up and encouraging a more casual, natural, and creative approach to expressing yourself.

Eclipses this year put special focus on spending habits — emphasizing the need to take charge of your finances —and on your relationships with others — spotlighting the need to find a balance between independence and your need for other people in your life.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.

daily.summary: With today's somewhat skittish transits, dear Pisces, watch for a tendency to overestimate how much time or energy you have before committing to something significant. Idealistic and humanitarian goals or impulses surface. The Moon heads into your solar ninth house later today, and widening your mind through unusual or different experiences can be a theme. Practical considerations could take a back seat now. Breaking your ideas or plans into parts can make sense, and can lead to small strides forward, and this is preferable to overshooting and getting nowhere. Avoid putting too high expectations on yourself today, and let yourself explore your ideas and desires without going too far.

We’ve divided our monthly horoscopes into 3 groups (or decanates) per sign for more accuracy. Remember that if you know your Ascendant, read forecasts for both your Sun sign and your Ascendant sign. If you know your birth time, but don’t know your Ascendant, be sure to seeHow to Obtain Your Astrology Chart here.

February brings a diverse mix of introspective and sociable energy to your world, dear Pisces. Huge stirrings are happening inside of you, but you’re also managing to get out and about and divide your time well. While you are in social demand this month, a part of you is likely to remain reserved or withdrawn, and this is healthy and necessary!

Much of February feels like you’re doing preparation work or laying down foundations. Make it your goal to be patient and enjoy the process. Moments of reflection and rest for yourself are important, especially in the first half of the month. It’s not the best time for highly demanding or competitive activities. There is an unusual number of influences highlighting your privacy sector, and soul-searching is necessary. You need a break from a hectic pace and the critical eyes of others.

While it's the end of the solar year for you (until February 18th), and this generally signals a period in which you are in the relative backwoods and possibly dealing with endings in your life, there is, nevertheless, much to be excited about. You are building and strengthening your courage.

yearly.overview: Saturn and Neptune leave your sign early in the year, dear Pisces, and you feel more grounded and less pressured–freer to be yourself. Your definition of comfort, abundance, security, and pleasure is evolving in 2026. Romantic, playful, and casual relationships are in the spotlight. New avenues for recreation, amusement, creative expression, and hobbies can open up. Pursuing your joy comes more naturally.
yearly.summary:
Saturn and Neptune leave your sign early in the year, dear Pisces, and you feel more grounded and less pressured–freer to be yourself. Your definition of comfort, abundance, security, and pleasure is evolving in 2026. Romantic, playful, and casual relationships are in the spotlight. New avenues for recreation, amusement, creative expression, and hobbies can open up. Pursuing your joy comes more naturally.

2026 is a time to explore your desires, different ways of “playing”, and enjoy yourself in the process. By July, ideally, you’ll have found more ways to entertain yourself and others, and the focus shifts to work, health, and daily habits. Opportunities to expand your reach and to improve your sense of wellness abound. The year ahead is one of work and play, but you may take either to excess at times! With some attention to moderation, however, it’s a powerful year for enjoying and expressing yourself more freely, as well as for connecting with a sense of purpose and usefulness.

There may have been times when you were more aloof and introspective, and certainly less spontaneous in recent years. In 2026, a stronger, more realistic, and more mature “you” emerges. At the same time, you feel lighter. Love can be fun and casual, and admirers can be plenty.

The year brings the need for special attention to your money, things, and feelings of comfort and security as Saturn and Neptune move into your resources sector. Your mission may be to watch your money more closely, reduce or eliminate redundancies, and treat yourself with more respect. The idea now is to take care of your resources so that they take care of you! Wherever Saturn is currently transiting, we may face some lessons, but while there can be some need to downsize or clean up your act, it’s not anything you can’t handle, and it will serve you exceptionally well as you advance.

While Saturn is asking you to be responsible with your money, Neptune has a longer-term mission in mind that breaks down rigidity in your money-making and money-handling methods. Uranus wants you to find a more authentic or spontaneous approach to your home life. This can be tricky at times, but manageable. Irregular schedules and perhaps some disruptions and tensions are possible this year as you adjust to these influences.

Uranus moving out of your communications sector in April suggests better daily schedules and routines, plus a stronger ability to focus on your studies. Tuning out distractions comes more readily this year. For some, this means settling on a course of study after a lengthy period of uncertainty.

From April 25th onward, living conditions and arrangements may feel less predictable. The same old domestic routines may no longer be viable. You may not be as settled with your living arrangements or in your inner world, and you’re on a journey of finding yourself now and in the years ahead. If you’ve been rooted in one place, this may change, even if you’ve felt quite fine in your position. Moving may happen, and it can be a relatively sudden thing for some. Others are seeking change within their homes or in their living conditions, and there can be much activity in the domestic environment. This influence stirs up quite a bit in the psyche, too, and Pisces will find much is going on under the hood. There is an edgier quality to your personality — you’re discovering your rough edges and learning to manage them. The theme is liberation as you free yourself from restrictive, limiting circumstances and attitudes.

From June 30th onward, wonderful energy is with you for your work, daily routines, and health endeavors. Your natural talents and skills are in high demand. If you’re looking for work, this is an excellent time for opportunities. It’s also strong for innovative wellness routines. You bring more confidence and energy to your daily life, chores, and self-improvement efforts. Watch for overload, but do take advantage of this time to make real improvements. Paying more attention to the mind/spirit element of your work and health can do wonders for you.

Your definitions of comfort, abundance, security, and pleasure are evolving, which affects how you treat your things, your domestic world, and your money. Your efforts to improve spending and structure or organize your things can boost your family life.

Saturn sextile Uranus in January.This is a time when original ideas take form or are developed successfully. There is an opportunity to combine stability and improvement or excitement with good results. The same can be true of innovation and tradition. We’re building our character and learning life lessons more readily. It’s a time of solid, meaningful progress.
